title: Eval-batch manifest
description: Audit record for one prompt batch processed through the harness. Validated by .github/workflows/batch-manifest-check.yml on PRs labelled 'prompt-batch-generated'.

batch_id.description: Stable identifier matching the directory name.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the batch was sealed.

model_id.description: Anthropic model ID that produced the batch artifacts (e.g., claude-opus-4-7).

findings.description: Finding IDs addressed by the batch (CONC-005, AUTH-004, PLATFORM, etc.).

prompt_hashes.description: Map of finding_id → fingerprint. SHA-256 of the engineering brief (sha256:HEX), or 'commit:<sha>' for findings whose original brief is not retained but whose artifact is anchored by a commit.

result_commit.description: Git SHA at which the batch's work landed.

tests_added.description: Number of NEW test methods added by this batch.

tests_passing.description: Of those added, how many pass at result_commit. Must equal tests_added before sign-off.

red_team_fixtures.description: Paths to red-team fixture files exercised by this batch's tests.

token_estimate.description: Approximate prompt+completion token count if measured; null if not tracked.

evaluator.description: Role + handle of the human reviewer (e.g., 'human-principal-engineer').
